news.headline: 3 elderly Hong Kong hikers found after 12-hour search
news.summary:
Three elderly Hong Kong hikers who were reported missing in Sai Kung have been found following a rescue operation that lasted more than 12 hours.

news.headline: Yomiuri Giants’ Shinnosuke Abe quits after arrest over alleged assault on daughter
news.summary:
Shinnosuke Abe – manager of the Yomiuri Giants, Japan’s oldest and most storied professional baseball team – stepped down on Tuesday following his arrest on suspicion of assaulting his daughter.
